phases.name: Year 1
phases.subtitle: Explore
phases.description: Foundation in child development, psychology, and early childhood education careers.

milestones.label: Explore early childhood education careers
milestones.description: Survey of FCS disciplines with emphasis on birth-kindergarten teaching and early intervention.

milestones.label: Study developmental psychology
milestones.description: Human behavior and developmental psychology foundations for understanding young children.

milestones.label: Begin teacher education pathway
milestones.description: NC teaching standards, classroom observation, and professional identity.

milestones.label: Master child development theory
milestones.description: Physical, cognitive, social, and emotional development birth through age 8.

phases.name: Year 2
phases.subtitle: Engage
phases.description: Culturally responsive pedagogy and assessment build teaching competencies.

milestones.label: Study culturally responsive pedagogy
milestones.description: Anti-bias curriculum and culturally sustaining practices for diverse early childhood classrooms.

milestones.label: Learn inclusive education practices
milestones.description: Special education law, IFSP/IEP development, and inclusive practices for young children.

milestones.label: Study family engagement strategies
milestones.description: Family-school partnerships and community resource coordination.

milestones.label: Explore health & wellness in ECE
milestones.description: Nutrition, safety, and wellness promotion for infants through preschool.

phases.name: Year 3
phases.subtitle: Develop
phases.description: Specialized B-K methods in literacy, assessment, and DAP build clinical teaching skills.

milestones.label: Master emergent literacy instruction
milestones.description: Language development, emergent reading/writing, and literacy-rich classroom environments.

milestones.label: Develop B-K assessment competencies
milestones.description: Authentic assessment, portfolio documentation, and developmental monitoring.

milestones.label: Create inclusive learning environments
milestones.description: Universal Design for Learning, assistive technology, and collaborative planning.

milestones.label: Master developmentally appropriate practice
milestones.description: NAEYC DAP framework, play-based learning, and project approach.

phases.name: Year 4
phases.subtitle: Launch
phases.description: Full-semester clinical practice completes the NC B-K Teaching License.

milestones.label: Complete infant/toddler clinical methods
milestones.description: Curriculum planning and clinical practice in infant/toddler settings.

milestones.label: Complete Pre-K/K clinical methods
milestones.description: Methods and clinical practice for pre-K and kindergarten classrooms.

milestones.label: Study trends in early childhood
milestones.description: NC Pre-K policy, quality rating systems, technology in ECE.

milestones.label: Complete full-semester student teaching
milestones.description: Full-semester clinical practice in a licensed B-K program.
